title: GitHub fundamentals - Administration basics and product features Part 2 of 2
summary: In this learning path, learn the basics of GitHub administration and discover the products that GitHub offers. This is the second learning path in a two part series.

sections.title: GitHub fundamentals - Administration basics and product features Part 2 of 2
sections.summary: In this learning path, learn the basics of GitHub administration and discover the products that GitHub offers. This is the second learning path in a two part series.

lessons.title: Manage sensitive data and security policies within GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Familiarize yourself with GitHub's basic security tools, which prepare repositories for secure development and industry-standard response to threats.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-sensitive-data-security-policies/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage sensitive data and security policies within GitHub

lessons.title: Authenticate and authorize user identities on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage the authentication and authorization of user identities on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/authenticate-authorize-user-identities-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Authenticate and authorize user identities on GitHub

lessons.title: GitHub administration for enterprise support and adoption
lessons.content_md:
Learn how GitHub Enterprise can make your administrative duties easier.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-administration-for-enterprise-support-adoption/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: GitHub administration for enterprise support and adoption

lessons.title: Manage GitHub Actions in the enterprise
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage GitHub Actions in the enterprise.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-github-actions-enterprise/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage GitHub Actions in the enterprise

lessons.title: Leverage GitHub Actions to publish to GitHub Packages
lessons.content_md:
Publish your code libraries or Docker images automatically and securely with GitHub Packages.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-packages/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Leverage GitHub Actions to publish to GitHub Packages

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica GitHub fundamentals - Administration basics and product features Part 2 of 2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **GitHub fundamentals - Administration basics and product features Part 2 of 2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
